model_formula: quality_score_5 ~ C(source_true, Treatment(reference='Human')) * C(cognitive_level, Treatment(reference='recall')) + rating_order_z
covariates: rating order within source and rater (standardized)
score_formula: quality_score_5 is the unweighted mean of 23 expert rubric component scores after each component is standardized to a 5-point scale using its own maximum score: 7 QGval components plus 16 ULM components. ULM Explicitness and Reasoning have 4-point maxima, and ULM Fairness has a 3-point maximum; all other components have 5-point maxima. qgeval_score_5 and llm_score_5 are the corresponding family-level means of standardized component scores.
